title: AI / Computer Vision Engineer
description: Build and deploy AI/ML models for real-time aerial image analysis. You'll work on object detection, segmentation, and classification pipelines using Python, PyTorch/TensorFlow, and OpenCV — integrated directly into our drone intelligence stack.

title: Drone Systems Engineer (Hardware)
description: Design, build, and test UAV platforms including airframes, propulsion systems, and flight controllers. You'll collaborate with embedded and software teams to deliver reliable drone systems for industrial survey applications.

title: GIS & Geospatial Analyst
description: Process LiDAR point clouds, orthomosaics, and satellite imagery into actionable geospatial intelligence. Proficiency in QGIS, ArcGIS, or similar tools required. Experience with photogrammetry software (Pix4D, Agisoft) is a plus.

title: Embedded Systems Developer
description: Develop low-latency firmware and edge computing solutions for onboard drone processors. Work with C/C++, ROS, and custom hardware interfaces to enable real-time AI inference at sub-200ms speeds.

title: Business Development Manager
description: Drive revenue growth by identifying and closing opportunities in mining, railways, highways, and energy sectors. You'll manage the full sales cycle — from prospecting and demos to proposals and contracts — for our drone survey and AI monitoring solutions.
